subject: A faerie in a wide-brimmed hat and dark coat reads a glowing scroll at a rain-streaked window
description: A slender, pointed-eared figure with translucent insectoid wings stands at a window pane streaked with rain or condensation. The figure wears a wide-brimmed dark hat and a long dark coat, with a belt and pouches visible. They hold an unrolled scroll or document from which a soft purple-pink magical glow emanates, and raise one hand delicately to examine it. The window behind them shows a warm glow from outside, suggesting a lamp or streetlight in the darkness. The overall palette is very dark: near-blacks, charcoal, and deep blue-gray, with the warm magenta glow of the scroll as the primary light source. The atmosphere is unmistakably noir — a spy or intelligence operative reviewing stolen intelligence.
foreground: faerie figure in hat and coat examining a glowing scroll
background: rain-streaked window with warm exterior light
emotion: cool concentration — calm, deliberate examination of secret document
